name: Zayo Network & Bandwidth Services API
what_it_does: Zayo REST API for fiber network, bandwidth services, and connectivity management. Enables AI agents to manage wavelength and dark fiber circuit ordering and provisioning for high-capacity connectivity, handle Ethernet and IP services circuit management for enterprise and carrier network operations, access network performance monitoring and circuit SLA tracking for network operations, retrieve cloud connect and multi-cloud fabric service management for hybrid cloud connectivity, manage colocation and data center services for infrastructure management, handle fiber route and availability lookups for network planning, access network trouble ticketing and repair workflow for network operations, retrieve invoice and billing management for connectivity cost management, manage bandwidth on demand and flexible capacity services for agile network operations, and integrate Zayo network services with ITSM, SD-WAN, and enterprise network management platforms.
use_cases: Ordering network circuits from connectivity procurement agents
Monitoring circuit performance from network operations agents
Managing cloud connections from multi-cloud agents
Provisioning bandwidth from network capacity agents
not_for: Consumer internet without carrier-grade network services
Last-mile access without fiber backbone and wavelength services
Small businesses without enterprise network bandwidth requirements
best_when: A large enterprise, carrier, or cloud provider using Zayo fiber and bandwidth services wants AI agents to automate circuit ordering, performance monitoring, cloud connectivity, and network operations.
avoid_when: NETWORK AVAILABILITY RISK: Automated Zayo network service changes affect production enterprise connectivity — network configuration automation requires change management controls. Zayo went private (2020, EQT Partners and Digital Colony, $14.3B) and has been restructuring; API stability and developer program maturity uncertain. Dark fiber and wavelength ordering have physical construction and provisioning lead times that automated agents must account for.

auth.notes: Zayo uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. No native webhooks. REST API with JSON. Boulder, Colorado HQ. Private (EQT Partners and DigitalBridge PE, taken private 2020 for $14.3B). Founded 2007. 130,000 route miles of fiber. Strong in dark fiber, wavelength, and cloud connect services for enterprise and carrier markets. Competes with Lumen (CenturyLink/Level 3), Crown Castle Fiber, and Uniti for fiber and bandwidth services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — contract-based enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual contract; per-circuit pricing varies by bandwidth and route
pricing.notes: Boulder, Colorado. Zayo (EQT/DigitalBridge PE, private). Founded 2007. 130,000 route miles fiber. Dark fiber, wavelength, Ethernet, cloud connect. Competes with Lumen and Crown Castle for enterprise fiber services.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per enterprise contract

known_agent_gotchas: NETWORK AVAILABILITY RISK: Automated network service changes require change management; unauthorized circuit modification can cause production network outages
PE private equity transition — Zayo went private 2020; API developer program and documentation investment uncertain during PE ownership and restructuring
Dark fiber physical provisioning — dark fiber and wavelength circuit provisioning requires physical network construction; automated ordering must account for weeks-to-months lead time
No webhooks — network event notification requires polling; no native event push for circuit alarms, SLA breaches, or provisioning completions
Multi-region network complexity — Zayo operates North American and European networks; transatlantic circuit ordering has different provisioning workflows and lead times
Bandwidth on demand latency — Zayo BoD (Bandwidth on Demand) services have provisioning latency; not truly instant elastic bandwidth
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise fiber networking. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Network circuit and connectivity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise networking. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Network service data.
